chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.50 of 2023 M/s Real International Trading Company Versus Mubashir Maqsood & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2623/23 2. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 2624/23 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 19.03.2024 None present. -.-.- None is present on behalf of the appellant. Even on the last date not was in attendance. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
